components.name: Header
components.style: fixed w-full z-50 top-0 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#060611]/80 border-b border-white/10 py-4

components.name: Hero Section
components.visuals: Background includes a sweeping deep blue/purple glow using absolute positioning and blur-3xl. Hero image overlay max bg-black/40.

components.name: Course Card
components.style: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-blue-500/30 hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(79,70,229,0.15)] group

components.name: Admission Form
components.style: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-12. Input fields: bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white focus:border-purple-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-purple-500. Uses Shadcn Form, Input, Select.

components.name: WhatsApp Button
components.style: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 group

hero_background.description: Deep blue and purple abstract glowing background to be used as a subtle overlay or layer in the Hero section

hero_students.description: Student coding at night - use as the main hero visual or bento grid hero cell

about_image_1.description: Dark screen with code snippets - to be used in the About section's bento grid

course_ai.description: Abstract AI neural network in blue and purple - for the AI Course Card

form_bg.description: Abstract lights pattern for admission form background layer

layout_grids.courses_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 (2x2 grid for the 4 courses)
layout_grids.about_bento: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with overlapping glass elements and imagery

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Outfit, Manrope, JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts.
Implement pure dark mode (bg-[#060611]). Do NOT use standard Shadcn light mode default.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements: buttons, links, form inputs, selects, and submit actions.
Use standard HTML+Tailwind for page layouts. Do not wrap entire sections in Shadcn Card if they are landing page components.
Use Shadcn Form, Input, and Select for the Admission section but override their default styles to match the glassmorphism theme (`bg-white/5 border-white/10`).
WhatsApp floating button must have a subtle pulse animation and be fixed bottom right.
Add glowing radial gradients (e.g., `bg-blue-600/20 blur-[100px]`) behind major sections to create the Tech vibe.
Ensure 'Pi and Pixels' logo is prominent in the header as text with a gradient fill.
